_meta.purpose: AI vision classification of LOGH VII character portraits (attribute tagging + named-character candidates).
_meta.method: Claude vision read of 256x320 upscaled portraits; 8 parallel classifier agents over 289 unique faces (de-duplicated via idkit slot groups).

self_check_vs_atlas_code.note: atlas folder code (oem=empire/male, oam=alliance/male) agreed with vision on 289/289 -> attribute tagging high-confidence.

anchor_validation.agent_described: black beret, black hair, calm young soldier

_meta.named_caveat: Named candidates are LOW confidence (agents were deliberately conservative; no anchor fed in). Coverage of real identities is intentionally sparse. Use review_queue for human verification; a 2nd anchor-fed pass would raise recall.
_meta.identity_correction: Named identification by face-number is UNSAFE: the dumpall global index is misaligned to art (see docs/logh7-portrait-ai-classification.md, INDEXCHECK). Only 2 identities are image-confirmed (Yang oam/0274, Schenkopp oam/0230). Attribute layer here remains reliable. Global attribute table: content/roster/portrait-ai-attributes-global.json
